mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.datatablename, e.id AS id_error FROM device d LEFT JOIN error e ON e.id_device_group = d.id_device_group AND e.error_code = 1001 AND e.`status` = 1 AND e.is_delete = 0 WHERE d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.id_site = #{id_site} AND d.id_device_group = 19 LIMIT 1
SELECT m.id_device FROM ${datatablename} m WHERE m.id_device = #{id_device} AND m.time >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -120 MINUTE) LIMIT 1

SELECT d.id, d.id_site, d.devicename, d.datatablename, d.job_tablename, d.last_updated, d.id_device_group, s.start_date_time, s.end_date_time, t.`value` AS timezone_value, e.id AS id_error FROM device d INNER JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site AND s.`status` = 1 INNER JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone LEFT JOIN error e ON e.id_device_group = d.id_device_group AND e.error_code = 1001 AND e.`status` = 1 AND e.is_delete = 0 WHERE d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.id_site = #{id_site} GROUP BY d.id

SELECT IF(COUNT(*) = 0, 1, 0) AS is_no_comm, MIN(u.time) AS start_date, MAX(u.time) AS end_date FROM ${datatablename} u WHERE u.id_device = #{id_device} AND u.time >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -2 HOUR)

SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM `alert` a INNER JOIN error e ON e.id = a.id_error AND e.is_delete = 0 AND e.`status` = 1 WHERE a.id_device = #{id_device} AND a.id_error = #{id_error} AND a.`status` = 1 AND a.is_delete = 0 LIMIT 1 ) AS totalRecord
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `alert_queue`( `id_device`, `id_error`, `start_date`, `end_date`, `asset`, `capacity` ) VALUES ( #{id_device}, #{id_error}, COALESCE(#{start_date}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')), #{end_date}, #{asset}, #{capacity} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE start_date = COALESCE(#{start_date}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')), is_queue = 0
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS id
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.id_device FROM `alert` a WHERE a.id_device = #{id_device} AND a.id_error = #{id_error} AND a.`status` = 1 AND a.is_delete = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE `alert` SET `status` = 0, end_date = COALESCE(#{end_date}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) WHERE `id` = #{id} AND `id_device` = #{id_device}
